subtitle.ja: 右手の人差し指に糸をかけて始めます。人差し指手前の糸を巻き付けます。左手の人差し指を右手人差し指の輪に下から入れて、輪を広げます
subtitle.en: Begin with the string on the right index finger. Wind the near index-finger string around it. Insert the left index finger up into the right index-finger loop and spread the loop.

subtitle.ja: 人差し指手前の2本の糸の間から、左親指で左人差し指の向こう上の糸を取り、右親指で右人差し指の向こう下の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: From between the two near index-finger strings, with the left thumb pick up the upper far left index-finger string, and with the right thumb pick up the lower far right index-finger string.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、人差し指向こうの糸を上から押さえ、人差し指手前の下側の糸を小指の背で取ります
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, move over and press down the far index strings, then with the backs of the little fingers pick up from below the near lower index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指で人差し指手前の糸を上から押さえて小指の輪に上から入れ、人差し指向こうの糸を取ります
subtitle.en: With both middle fingers, move over and press down the near index strings, insert them from above into the little-finger loops, and pick up from below the far index strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の糸を静かに外し、人差指し手前の糸を取ります
subtitle.en: Gently release the thumb strings from both hands and pick up from below the near index-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の小指で、中指向こう側の糸をにぎります。
subtitle.en: With both little fingers, grasp the far middle-finger strings.

subtitle.ja: 左右の中指から糸を外して完成です
subtitle.en: Release the middle-finger strings from both hands to show the finished figure.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指と小指の糸を外すとやりが投げられ、最初の形に戻ります
subtitle.en: When the thumb and little-finger strings are released on both hands, the spear is thrown and the figure returns to the starting position.
